settings.name: Custom background map
settings.description: Upload a customized background map as a geotiff file (e.g. `.tif`). The map is expected to be in lon/lat (EPSG:4326). See instructions to create custom background map in the documentation of the App.

settings.name: Quick check of extent & projection
settings.description: Obtain map with all tracks on the custom basemap. This image will contain the supplied map and the tracking data without any changes in the extent. This is useful to check if supplied map and track data overlap as intended before creating all plots. When this option is checked all other plotting options below are ignored.

settings.name: Choose plot type
settings.description: Choose which maps to produce. Every option produces the a map with all tracks

options.displayText: Map per track, zoomed to extent of each track
Map per track, extent of dataset
Map per track, extent of each track & of dataset
Only the map with all tracks

settings.name: Plot as lines with/without points
settings.description: Choose whether each track is drawn as lines only, or as lines and points.

settings.name: Include legend on map with all tracks
settings.description: Each track will be assigned a color, check this box to view the legend

settings.name: Colour of the tracks in the per-track maps
settings.description: Color used to draw the tracks in the per-track maps. Provide an colour name (e.g. 'black', 'red', 'darkblue'). The list of recognised colour names can be found for example here https://r-charts.com/colors/

settings.name: Map width (mm)
settings.description: Width, in millimetres, of the saved maps. The height is derived automatically from the data aspect ratio.
